description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:python3.10-alpine Docker image and define a single test stage. Add a lint job that runs in the test stage, sets PATH to $UV_INSTALL_DIR, runs `uv sync`, then `uv run ruff format --diff .` and `uv run ruff check .`, finally prunes the UV cache with `uv cache prune --ci`; it uses a cache keyed on uv.lock storing $UV_CACHE_DIR and is interruptible. Add a tests job also in the test stage that sets PATH, runs `uv sync`, then `uv run mypy m3d tests`, `uv run pytest --cov=m3d --cov-report=term`, and `uv cache prune --ci`; it uses the same cache configuration, is interruptible, and extracts coverage using the regex /TOTAL.+ ([0-9]{1,3}%)/. Define variables UV_CACHE_DIR as .uv-cache and UV_INSTALL_DIR as $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.uv-bin.
